description: Bugfix cycle 1 for Milestone 19 — Structured Requirements. Fixes 3 defects found in QA review: 2 broken pre-existing tests (project_type now required) and 1 broken context agent test (new project_type parameter).

userStories.title: Fix: Pre-existing tests broken by required project_type field
userStories.description: Fix defect DEF-001 from QA report qa-m19-structured-requirements.md. Two pre-existing tests send POST /api/projects/ without the now-required project_type field.
acceptanceCriteria: test_new_project_defaults_to_private passes (sends project_type in POST payload)
test_create_project_with_first_message passes (sends project_type in POST payload)
All other existing tests still pass
userStories.notes: Defect: DEF-001. Files: services/gateway/apps/collaboration/tests/test_visibility.py:40-49, services/gateway/apps/projects/tests/test_views.py:49-67. Expected: Tests pass. Actual: Tests fail with 400 because project_type is missing from POST payload. Suggested fix: In test_visibility.py line 42-43, change payload from {"first_message": "Hello world"} to {"project_type": "software"}. In test_views.py line 52-53, change payload from {"first_message": "My project"} to {"first_message": "My project", "project_type": "software"}.

userStories.title: Fix: Context agent test assertion missing project_type parameter
userStories.description: Fix defect DEF-002 from QA report qa-m19-structured-requirements.md. The context agent test asserts retrieve() was called without project_type, but the code now passes project_type=None.
acceptanceCriteria: All other existing tests still pass
userStories.notes: Defect: DEF-002. File: services/ai/tests/test_context_agent.py:159-161. Expected: Test passes. Actual: AssertionError because assert_called_once_with expects retrieve(query_embedding=...) but actual call is retrieve(query_embedding=..., project_type=None). Suggested fix: Change the assertion at line 159-161 to include project_type=None in the expected call.

userStories.title: Fix: Unused imports in ai-context-tab test
userStories.description: Fix defect DEF-003 from QA report qa-m19-structured-requirements.md. Three unused imports cause ESLint errors.
userStories.notes: Defect: DEF-003. File: frontend/src/__tests__/ai-context-tab.test.tsx:2-7. Expected: No new ESLint errors. Actual: screen, userEvent, and vi are imported but never used. Suggested fix: Remove unused imports — keep only {describe, it, expect, beforeEach} from vitest and {render, waitFor} from @testing-library/react. Remove the userEvent import entirely.
